prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 14013→11934→11735→31639→18480。2024 年因批次合并（本科一批 A1 段）出现异常大幅后移至 31639，2025 年回归至 18480，近两年波动较大，2025 年基准约 18480 名；该校在山西省理科/物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 157→155→161→163→169 人，总体呈小幅扩招趋势；2026 年计划 166 人，较 2025 年减少 3 人（-1.8%），属小幅缩招，对竞争略有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 56 名，近年排名在 48–61 之间波动，整体稳定；2021–2026 年声誉文件中均无该校明显舆情事件记录，抖音热度未进入总排名前 106 名（评价为一般），投档异常文件中亦无该校记录，整体声誉平稳，无明显报考心理冲击；但该校传统优势学科为地质学、地质资源与地质工程等，与招生专业中的地质学类、地质类等对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业在 2024–2026 年专业热度分析中持续为高热推荐/推荐，对理科考生吸引力强；山西省 2026 年物理类考生约 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 3.4%，考生规模缩小使竞争略有缓解；该校位于湖北武汉，非本省高校，无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 18480、2026 年小幅缩招（-1.8%）与考生减少（-3.4%）的净效应（竞争略有缓解），以及工科专业热度持续、声誉平稳等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅前移（更易进）。预测最低位次约 18233 名，区间 17733–18733 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程等）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程）
- 地质学类（国家拔尖计划/菁英班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（测控技术与仪器、自动化）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 地理科学类（地理科学、地理信息科学）
- 机械类（机械设计制造及其自动化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 地质类（地质工程、勘查技术与工程）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、水文与水资源工程等）
- 土木类（土木工程、城市地下空间工程）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 17733–18733 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（计算机、电子信息、地质学菁英班）作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<17733）可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>18733）建议以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 14013→11934→11735→31639→18480. In 2024, due to batch merging (undergraduate batch A1 segment), there was an abnormal large drop to 31639, and in 2025 it returned to 18480, with significant fluctuations in the past two years; the 2025 baseline is about 18480th place. The university's science/physics category plans in Shanxi from 2021 to 2025 were 157→155→161→163→169 students respectively, showing a slight expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 166 students, a decrease of 3 students (-1.8%) compared to 2025, which is a slight contraction, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 56th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48 and 61, overall stable; from 2021 to 2026, there are no records of significant public opinion incidents in reputation files, Douyin popularity did not enter the top 106 (rated as average), and there are no records in abnormal admission files, overall reputation is stable with no significant psychological impact on applications; however, the university's traditional advantageous disciplines are geology, geological resources and geological engineering, etc., corresponding to the geology class and geology category in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering have been consistently rated as high-heat/recommended in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, strongly attracting science students; in 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition due to the smaller examinee pool; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the net effect of the 2025 baseline ranking of 18480, the slight contraction in 2026 (-1.8%) and the decrease in examinees (-3.4%) (slightly easing competition), along with sustained popularity of engineering majors and stable reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 18233, with a range of 17733–18733.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Geology (National Top Talent Plan/Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Automation)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Geographical Sciences (Geography, Geographic Information Science)
- Mechanical (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Geology (Geological Engineering, Exploration Technology and Engineering)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources Engineering, etc.)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Urban Underground Space Engineering)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17733–18733, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Geology Elite Class) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<17733), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>18733), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 2164、2026 年明显缩招（-13.3%）与考生大幅减少（-25.6%）的净效应（竞争明显缓解），以及文科专业热度平稳、声誉无波动等因素，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年明显前移（更易进）。预测最低位次约 1961 名，区间 1608–2314 名。

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 approximately 56th, stable in recent years; no significant public opinion incidents recorded in reputation documents from 2021 to 2026, Douyin popularity is average, no records in abnormal filing documents, overall reputation stable; liberal arts majors (Law, Business Administration, Administrative Management, English, etc.) lack direct A-class discipline support, making disciplinary appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity is recommended/differentiated wait-and-see, Business Administration is differentiated wait-and-see, overall liberal arts major popularity is stable; Shanxi Province 2026 history category examinees approximately 63113, a significant decrease of about 25.6% from 84879 in 2025, the substantial reduction in examinee scale significantly eases competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local province university, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the net effect of the 2025 baseline ranking of 2164, significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-13.3%), and substantial decrease in examinees (-25.6%) (competition significantly eased), along with stable liberal arts major popularity and no reputation fluctuations, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 1961, range 1608–2314.
